candidate_definition_hints.text: This is a tool to convert assembly as generated by a C/C++ compiler into Golang assembly. It is meant to be used in combination with [asm2plan9s](https://github.com/minio/asm2plan9s) in order to automatically generate pure Go wrappers for C/C++ code (that may for instance take a…
